mapper.select: SELECT * FROM cabinet WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY cabinet_no ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM cabinet WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM cabinet WHERE cabinet_no = #{cabinetNo} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cabinet (id, cabinet_no, name, location, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{cabinetNo}, #{name}, #{location}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, COALESCE(#{deleted}, 0))
mapper.update: UPDATE cabinet SET cabinet_no = #{cabinetNo}, name = #{name}, location = #{location}, status = #{status}, created_at = #{createdAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE cabinet SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
